summary: Integrated ADR 0265 on newest exact main release 0.177.78 by replacing mutable remote mirrors with immutable content-addressed repository snapshots, unpacking each build-server run into a fresh `.lv3-runs/` namespace, and re-verifying the exact-main snapshot upload and remote validation path on docker-build-lv3 from commit 768ab550.

verification.observed: `LV3_SESSION_ID=adr-0265-main-race REMOTE_EXEC_VERBOSE=1 make check-build-server` passed from commit `768ab550`, built snapshot `de22562164d38fb57a8f2dcfb8ab8c58a49094fbed15643b73df2ccf3b52fce0`, and verified dry-run upload plus fresh run namespace `/home/ops/builds/platform_server/.lv3-session-workspaces/adr-0265-main-race/repo/.lv3-runs/20260329T130452Z-de22562164d3/repo`.

`LV3_SESSION_ID=adr-0265-main-race REMOTE_EXEC_VERBOSE=1 make remote-validate` passed remotely from snapshot `de22562164d38fb57a8f2dcfb8ab8c58a49094fbed15643b73df2ccf3b52fce0`; `alert-rule-validation`, `ansible-syntax`, `dependency-graph`, `policy-validation`, `schema-validation`, and `type-check` all passed from `/home/ops/builds/platform_server/.lv3-session-workspaces/adr-0265-main-race/repo/.lv3-runs/20260329T130506Z-de22562164d3/repo`.

notes: This receipt supersedes ADR 0156 as the canonical `remote_build_gateway` evidence because the remote builder now consumes immutable content-addressed snapshots instead of mutable mirrored worktrees.
The session-scoped workspace contract from ADR 0156 remains in force; ADR 0265 narrows the repository input inside that session to one immutable snapshot per run.

Release 0.177.78 is the first repo version that includes ADR 0265, and platform version 0.130.53 is the first verified live platform version with the immutable snapshot path active on the newest exact main.
